title: Vellum
description: A social web app where users can register, log in, and share movie and book posts with profile-based updates.
detailDescription: Vellum is a full-stack CRUD application focused on books and movies. It supports authentication, session-based access control, profile editing, and post management for both media types.

features.title: Authentication and Sessions
features.description: Users can register, log in securely, and maintain authenticated sessions.

features.title: Movie and Book Posts
features.description: Create, edit, and delete posts for books and movies with metadata like genre, year, and comments.

features.title: Profile Management
features.description: Users can update profile details and view recent posts in a profile dashboard.
